## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedBarTruffle.setEnrobingChocolate() method

Sets the enrobing chocolate. Pushes current state to undo before change, clears redo.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setEnrobingChocolate(chocolateId: IngredientId | undefined): Result<void>;
```
